title: Clarify unsupported database request (SQLite3)

requirements.text: The user has requested SQLite3 as the database layer. This platform uses Motoko on the Internet Computer as the backend, which does not support external databases such as SQLite3. All persistent state must continue to be stored using Motoko stable variables and actor-based data structures in backend/main.mo. No changes to the backend storage architecture are required or possible.
acceptanceCriteria: The backend continues to use Motoko stable variables for all persistent data (Users, Requests, AuditLogs, Notifications).
No external database dependencies (SQLite3 or otherwise) are introduced.
All existing CRUD operations remain functional using the actor-based in-memory/stable storage model.

constraints: SQLite3 and all external relational databases are not supported on this platform. The backend must use Motoko stable variables exclusively.
Do not modify any files listed under frontend.immutablePaths.
Do not alter the single-actor backend architecture in backend/main.mo.
nonGoals: Introducing any external database (SQLite3, PostgreSQL, MySQL, etc.).
Migrating backend storage to a different persistence mechanism.
Any frontend or UI changes as part of this request.
